title: Table Fixing - Quality Control
author: Plazi Verein
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The presentation integrates Plazi's learning courses. Here the steps to enhance and fix    annotation problems in tables to be extracted from publications using GoldenGATE Imagine, Plazi’s tool for data extraction from publications, are presented.
steps_raw: The presentation integrates Plazi's learning courses. Here the steps to enhance and fix    annotation problems in tables to be extracted from publications using GoldenGATE Imagine, Plazi’s tool for data extraction from publications, are presented.
